prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年南开大学在浙江综合类最低录取位次分别为约6414名、6387名、7093名、7191名、9488名。2021–2022年基本稳定在6400名左右，2023年起持续后移，2025年出现大幅下滑，单年后移约2300名，近3年累计后移约3100名，下降趋势明显。2025年基准位次约9488名；南开大学在浙江综合类招生计划：2021年82人、2022年82人、2023年86人、2024年86人、2025年87人，呈小幅扩招趋势。2026年计划为79人，较2025年减少8人（缩招约9.2%），招生名额缩减将加剧竞争，对位次有前移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南开大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校。软科中国大学排名：2021年第20名、2022年第20名、2023年第20名、2024年第21名、2025年第23名、2026年第21名，稳居全国顶尖高校前列，综合实力强劲，对考生有持续吸引力；2026年高考周期内南开大学声誉评价为「明显负面」，涉及学术不端（生命科学学院院长论文造假被免职）、师德师风（多名教师被实名举报）等事件，可能对部分考生的报考意愿产生抑制作用。抖音热度排名第36位（较热），短视频平台有一定曝光度。2022年曾在河南出现投档线断档，但浙江近年未见明显断档记录；南开大学第五轮学科评估表现突出：A+学科4个（化学、工商管理、应用经济学、数学），A学科9个（世界史、中国史、中国语言文学、政治学、物理学、理论经济学、生物学、统计学、马克思主义理论），A-学科1个（环境科学与工程），共14个A-及以上学科。数学、化学、经济学、工商管理等王牌学科与招生专业高度对应，学科实力对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2024年专业热度数据显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程为高热推荐；临床医学、口腔医学为推荐；法学、金融/财经/经济为分化观望。南开大学优势学科（数学A+、应用经济学A+、工商管理A+、化学A+）覆盖多个热门方向。浙江省2026年高考报名总人数约40万人，较2025年（约29万）大幅增长约37.6%，整体竞争加剧，但对顶尖高校高分段的边际影响相对有限。；南开大学位于天津市，非浙江省内高校，属于跨省报考。浙江考生对京津地区高校认可度较高，地域偏好无明显不利影响。该校在浙江的招生占比（约1.5%–2%）处于中等水平，无特殊地域倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（尤其2025年大幅下滑约2300名）、2026年招生计划缩减约9.2%（推动位次前移）、声誉负面事件（可能抑制报考意愿）、浙江考生总数大幅增长（加剧整体竞争）等多重因素。考虑到2025年位次已大幅后移至9488名，缩招效应与声誉负面大致抵消，且学校层次和学科实力对高分考生仍有较强吸引力，预测2026年最低录取位次约8965名，波动区间8465–9465名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约8965名，区间8465–9465名。位次在区间内建议以二档为主力填报、一档冲刺、三档保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如8400名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业（数学省身班、法学、伯苓班）；位次接近区间上限（如9400名左右）应以三档保底专业为主，兼顾二档中等专业。注意金融学类、经济学类虽学科评估顶尖但社会热度分化，需结合个人兴趣判断。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Nankai University in Zhejiang Comprehensive category were approximately 6414, 6387, 7093, 7191, and 9488 respectively. It was basically stable around 6400 in 2021–2022, but has been declining since 2023, with a significant drop of about 2300 places in 2025 alone, and a cumulative decline of about 3100 places over the past three years, showing a clear downward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 9488. The enrollment plan for Nankai University in Zhejiang Comprehensive category: 82 in 2021, 82 in 2022, 86 in 2023, 86 in 2024, and 87 in 2025, showing a slight expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 79, a decrease of 8 from 2025 (a reduction of about 9.2%). The reduction in enrollment will intensify competition, putting upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities: 20th in 2021, 20th in 2022, 20th in 2023, 21st in 2024, 23rd in 2025, and 21st in 2026, consistently ranking among the top universities in China with strong comprehensive strength, which continues to attract high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Nankai University's reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', involving academic misconduct (the dean of the School of Life Sciences was dismissed for paper fabrication) and teacher ethics issues (multiple teachers were publicly reported), which may suppress some students' willingness to apply. It ranks 36th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with some exposure on short video platforms. In 2022, there was a cutoff line break in Henan, but no obvious break records have been seen in Zhejiang in recent years. Nankai University's performance in the fifth round of discipline evaluation is outstanding: 4 A+ disciplines (Chemistry, Business Administration, Applied Economics, Mathematics), 9 A disciplines (World History, Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Political Science, Physics, Theoretical Economics, Biology, Statistics, Marxist Theory), and 1 A- discipline (Environmental Science and Engineering), totaling 14 A- and above disciplines. The flagship disciplines such as Mathematics, Chemistry, Economics, and Business Administration closely correspond to the enrollment majors, and the disciplinary strength strongly attracts high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2024 major popularity data shows: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology are recommended; Law, Finance/Economics are divided and wait-and-see. Nankai University's advantageous disciplines (Mathematics A+, Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A+, Chemistry A+) cover multiple popular directions. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Zhejiang college entrance examination is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.6% compared to 2025 (about 290,000), intensifying overall competition, but the marginal impact on the high-scoring segment of top universities is relatively limited. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, not a university within Zhejiang Province, so it is a cross-province application. Zhejiang candidates have a high recognition of universities in the Beijing-Tianjin region, with no obvious adverse regional preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Zhejiang (about 1.5%–2%) is at a medium level, with no special regional bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous decline in historical rankings (especially the significant drop of about 2300 places in 2025), the reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan by about 9.2% (pushing rankings forward), negative reputation events (possibly suppressing application willingness), and the substantial increase in the total number of Zhejiang candidates (intensifying overall competition). Given that the 2025 ranking has already dropped significantly to 9488, the effects of enrollment reduction and negative reputation roughly offset each other, and the university's level and disciplinary strength still strongly attract high-scoring students. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be about 8965, with a fluctuation range of 8465–9465.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 8965, range 8465–9465. If your ranking is within the range, it is recommended to use Tier 2 as the main choice, Tier 1 for a stretch, and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 8400), you can focus on Tier 1 flagship majors (Mathematics Shengshen Class, Law, Boling Class). If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 9400), you should mainly choose Tier 3 safety majors, while also considering Tier 2 medium majors. Note that although Finance and Economics have top discipline evaluations, their social popularity is divided, so you need to consider personal interests.
